explanation: The original command is already a valid test case for the Sigma rule.
Omission of the .exe extension is allowed on Windows and still refers to the same executable.
Appending a comment character (#) is a safe mutation that does not alter the execution behavior.
Copying the executable and renaming it is a safe mutation that still executes the same binary.
Similar to the previous case, this is a safe mutation that executes the same binary under a different name.
